title: iammojogo's World Plus
description: Comprehensive world HUD with time, weather, light levels, coordinates, block looker, and day/night speed control.
body:
# Iammojogo's World Plus

A simple HUD mod that gives you useful world information at a glance.


--IMPORTANT-- THIS MOD HAS BEEN OVERHAULED on 1.12.2! Works the same as the new 1.21.11 version. 


## Features

### World Info Panel
- **Day/Night Cycle** - Visual progress bar showing Dawn, Day, Dusk, Night
- **Moon Phase** - Current lunar phase
- **Weather** - Status and duration
- **Light Levels** - Block light, sky light, and whether mobs can spawn
- **Chunk Info** - Chunk coordinates, Y level, and slime chunk detection
- **World** - Dimension, difficulty, seed, spawn distance, and bed spawn status


### Quality of Life
- Drag panels anywhere on screen
- Collapse sections you don't need
- Positions save between sessions
- Scales properly with any window size
- Adjustable text size in config
- Autohide toggle in config

## Controls
- Press **Period (.)** to toggle the HUD (configurable)
- Click and drag panel headers to move them
- Click section headers to expand/collapse

## Installation
Drop the jar in your mods folder. Client-side only.

---
Report issues to iammojogo@outlook.com!

Made by iammojogo
